zh.lifeSummary: Alice Davenport於1252年出生在英國爾包頓。她和Robert MASSEY至少有11個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1337年在英國英格蘭爾塔頓享年85歲。

zh-hans.Bucklow, Cheshire, England: 英国爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Davenport于1252年出生在英国爾包頓。她和Robert MASSEY至少有11个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1337年在英国英格兰爾塔頓享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Davenport was born in 1252, in Bowdon, Cheshire, England. She had at least 11 sons and 2 daughters with Robert MASSEY. She died in 1337, in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Davenport est née en 1252, à Bowdon, Cheshire, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles avec Robert MASSEY. Elle est décédée en 1337, à Tatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Davenport wurde 1252 in Bowdon, Cheshire, England geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert MASSEY mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1337 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Davenport è nata il nel 1252 nel Bowdon, Cheshire, England. Lei avuto almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie con Robert MASSEY. Morì nel 1337, nel Tatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.
